## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Arena to discuss SEO strategy, content performance, and new opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Organic leads are returning after a 3-week lull, with 3 leads in the last 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [SEO performance is improving, with 335 clicks (up from 241) and \~10,000 more impressions vs. last week](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [New content strategy focusing on second screen, Black Friday/Cyber Monday, and Arena benefits for live events/elections](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [Potential for aligning SEO with account-based marketing, especially with new football team partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)

## Topics

### Organic Lead Generation

  - [3 leads received in the last 2-3 weeks after a 3-week dry spell](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Leads likely related to rich material and second screen e-book](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Strategy to create articles on second screen topics (e.g., app combinations, meeting scheduling)](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)

### SEO Performance Metrics

  - [109 articles published (106 confirmed, 3 pending), 99 indexed](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [335 clicks this week (up from 241 last week)](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Nearly 10,000 more impressions compared to last week](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Cumulative growth charts created for clicks and impressions over 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Paulo prefers non-stacked weekly graphs for easier trend analysis](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - ["Arena vs. LM Arena" article (published Oct 11) performing exceptionally well](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [High-impression articles not always correlating with high click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Focus on improving metadata (titles, descriptions) to increase CTR](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Upcoming content: Black Friday/Cyber Monday, Arena benefits for news/live events/elections](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [35 total refreshed articles, with 5 new refreshes launched today](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)

### New Opportunities

  - [Potential for articles addressing customer pain points (e.g., revenue generation, website growth)](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
  - [CDP (Customer Data Platform) keywords declining - need to create/improve related content](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
  - [Aligning SEO with account-based marketing strategy](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Possible content around football team partnerships (Everton, Waterford, Manchester City, Hamadry)](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)

### Technical SEO

  - [Using regex in Google Search Console to filter and analyze Arena-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Discussed methods for separating brand vs. non-brand search terms in analysis](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Paulo to share more context on second screen strategy via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Andrej to record a video explaining regex usage in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Review and potentially revise metadata for high-impression, low-click articles](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Continue focus on community keywords and second screen content](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [Andrej to analyze keywords and positions for ranking articles](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [Paulo to share empathy map and customer feedback for content ideation](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)
  - [Explore creation of football team-related content pending sales team input](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [Streamline and consolidate performance charts for refreshed and new content](https://fathom.video/share/_5d2tosAkvnJTF-ZspaCi3wutowN6b6E?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
